jeez, you could fit the turkish army in there

Yep, so we found out today- it's a boy. A healthy one. Stats I can remember:

  • 311 mm head circumference
  • 76 mm femur length
  • Both lobes of the brain present. Already has one up on his dad, little bugger!

err... that's about it. Hell, I was just glad to see two arms and two legs.
To the right is a profile shot for those who are interested...

Our ultrasound-ist (Delores? Linda? Deborah? whatever her name was) said it (I suppose I should start calling it "he") was fine. Active guy; had the hiccups during the exam. The world may be blessed with a monstrous hybrid Jen/Rich GI tract. Let's hope the kid gets Jen's lactose tolerance, or there may be some, er, explosive situations in this kid's future.

Other stats of interest: Apparently the lil' dude has a scrotum the size of b lil' dude has a scrotum the size of burlap 50 lb. potato(e) sack. Not that I'm surprised or anything...

NEXT PROJECT: think of boy names. Any suggestions? E-mail them to us.

Last updated 12/17/99.

dy>
